title: Playground
description: A personal flywheel for habits, dreams, and projects. Build, act, learn, repeat.

items.name: Screen time
items.next: Review weekly average and set a target.

log.note: Started tracking. Awareness is the first step.

items.name: Meditation
items.next: Lock in a consistent time of day.

log.note: Started tracking. Practice is established but not yet daily.

items.name: DM a friend
items.focus: Reaching out to one person daily.
items.next: Keep it going for a full month and notice what shifts.

log.note: Started tracking. Building the daily habit of intentional connection.

items.name: Fast after dinner
items.focus: No eating after dinner. Building the pattern.

log.note: Started tracking. New habit, working on consistency.

items.name: Wake to alarm
items.focus: Getting up when the alarm goes off, no snoozing.
items.next: Set one consistent wake time and protect it.

log.note: Started tracking. Working on discipline around morning routine.

items.name: Dancing
items.focus: Active in 5Rhythms and learning swing. Want to explore latin styles.
items.next: Find a latin dance class or social.

log.note: Started tracking. Already practicing 5Rhythms and swing. Latin is the next frontier.

items.name: Music
items.focus: West African rhythm class is the anchor. Interested in expanding to voice and other instruments.
items.next: Try one thing with voice — a class, a jam, anything.

log.note: Started tracking. Rhythm class is ongoing. Voice and instruments are aspirational.

items.name: Coloft
items.focus: Active in local gatherings. Want to explore the region more and build better community tools.
items.next: Plan one regional trip or adventure.

log.note: Started tracking. Local engagement is solid. Regional exploration and event capture tools are potential next projects.

items.name: Nature
items.focus: Aspiring to live closer to the land. Plant identification, gardening, and fishing are the entry points.
items.next: Pick one: find a plant ID walk, a community garden, or go fishing.

log.note: Started tracking. Strong interest but no action yet. Permaculture and hunting are further out.
